banner.title: Before you explore
banner.description: This site is free, open-source, and built entirely with AI. We use cookies to understand what works and to power things like comments. Nothing shady — you pick what you are okay with.

categories.label: Necessary
categories.description: Core cookies that keep the site working — things like remembering your consent choice. Always on.

categories.label: Analytics
categories.description: Help us understand which pages and apps get the most love. Data is anonymous — no personal profiles.

categories.label: Marketing
categories.description: Not currently in use, but included for when we ever run campaigns. Won't be enabled without your say-so.

categories.label: Functional
categories.description: Powers the comment sections. Without this, you can read comments but won't be able to leave one.

ccpa.doNotSellLinkText: Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
